Implements a full FastAPI backend with async SQLAlchemy ORM, JWT authentication, Pydantic validation, WebSockets for real-time updates, and background tasks. Notable patterns include dependency injection for DB sessions and user auth, a custom in-memory WebSocket connection manager, and paginated database queries.
